description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectangular layout, surrounded by a wooden fence and featuring a spacious green lawn. The structure has flat roofs and large, floor-to-ceiling windows along the rear facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the bungalow is adorned with a row of dense white shrubs, a central walkway, and a driveway leading to a two-car parking area. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, visible through the open roof design, and the backyard includes a paved patio area. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some wooden accent panels visible on the interior partitions. The overall design is minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large rear windows, a fenced yard, and a driveway with parking. The design features clean lines, white walls, and a spacious green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, white shrubs, central walkway, and driveway with two parked cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green lawn, side wall, and a single car parked near the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large floor-to-ceiling windows, a paved patio, and the expansive backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side lawn, white shrubs, and the paved driveway.
